hero.headline: Not a listing portal. A place where businesses are prepared and sold properly.
hero.subheadline: We turn companies into structured, understandable and investable opportunities.

problem.title: The problem
problem.sellerDesc: Publishing a listing and waiting is not selling. Without financial structure or preparation, buyers distrust and prices get negotiated down.
problem.buyerDesc: Interpreting incomplete data, assuming hidden risks and making decisions without homogeneous criteria is the norm on most platforms.

sellers.label: For sellers
sellers.title: For those who want to sell properly
sellers.point1: Organize your business before going to market
sellers.point3: Present the company with clear financial criteria
sellers.point4: Maximize value and reduce friction in negotiation
sellers.keyPhrase: You don't upload a listing. You build a transaction.

buyers.label: For buyers
buyers.title: For those who want to buy with criteria
buyers.point4: Make decisions supported by real financial insight
buyers.keyPhrase: You don't buy blind. You buy with clarity.

difference.title: Our difference
difference.subtitle: Buscobusiness combines a curated marketplace, CFO-level financial analysis, business preparation and decision-making support.
difference.pillar1Desc: Only verified businesses prepared for transaction
difference.pillar4Desc: Support in valuation, decision and financing
difference.statement1: A business is not sold well because it is published.
difference.statement2: It is sold well when it is prepared.

final.statement: We turn companies into investable opportunities.
final.subtitle: Clarity, structure and execution for serious buyers and sellers.

buy.ebitdaExplanation: It's the earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortization. It's a simple metric to evaluate how much a business generates with its basic operations, ignoring factors like debts or accounting rules.
buy.notFindingTitle: Can't find what you're looking for?
buy.notFindingDesc: Contact us and we'll help you find the perfect business for you
buy.labordaMiniDesc: Iconic Andorran Borda restaurant with traditional Andorran cuisine in a rustic and cozy atmosphere with fireplace. Loyal and consolidated clientele, with growth potential through an unexploited outdoor terrace.
labordaMiniHighlights: Renowned Borda restaurant with history in Andorra
buy.restCentroMiniDesc: Consolidated and well-recognized restaurant with loyal clientele and unbeatable location near Av. Meritxell, with capacity and room for improvement towards very attractive profitability levels.
buy.alpineMiniDesc: Leading cybersecurity company with operations in Andorra and Spain. Diversified portfolio: Threat Hunting, Consulting and Offensive Cybersecurity. Exceeded revenue and client forecasts.
buy.infinitypayMiniDesc: Payment solutions company with payment gateway, POS terminals and security solutions. 99% annual recurrence with 2000+ POS units and 90% of major companies integrated.
buy.confHostMiniDesc: Consolidated and recognized restaurant with loyal clientele and unbeatable location near Av. Meritxell, with room for improvement towards very attractive profitability.
buy.confComMiniDesc: Specialized commerce with recognized brand and loyal customer base. Optimized operations and consolidated suppliers.
buy.confServMiniDesc: Consolidated services company with loyal client portfolio and recurring contracts. Strategic location and trained team willing to continue.
buy.confIndMiniDesc: Consolidated industrial company with modern machinery and automated processes. Long-term contracts with institutional clients.
buy.confTechMiniDesc: Comprehensive IT and telecom support: Virtualization, Microsoft 365, VoIP (3CX Gold Partner), Cybersecurity and Cloud Services. 9 years of operation.

footer.tagline: The marketplace where real businesses change hands with transparency and criteria.
footer.disclaimerText: buscobusiness.com is an advertising platform (marketplace) that facilitates contact between buyers and sellers of businesses. We do not act as intermediaries, advisors or brokers in transactions, unless expressly indicated otherwise in specific contracted services. Each user is responsible for verifying published information and conducting relevant legal, tax and financial checks before any transaction.
footer.designedFor: Designed for entrepreneurs and business owners looking for real opportunities.

hero.headline: Selling a business is not posting an ad. It's structuring a transaction.
hero.subheadline: Before publishing your company, we perform a professional financial valuation and business structuring process to maximize your value and attract serious buyers.
hero.keyPhrase: You don't upload a listing. You build a transaction.

not.point1: A classifieds portal where anyone publishes without filtering
not.point2: A platform that lists businesses without verification or preparation
not.point3: A generic directory without financial criteria or guidance

yes.point1: A curated marketplace with professional financial valuation
yes.point2: A preparation process that maximizes value before publication
yes.point3: A team that structures the transaction from start to finish

valuation.title: Why Pre-Market Valuation Is Mandatory
valuation.subtitle: Every business listed on buscobusiness.com goes through a structured financial preparation process.
valuation.poweredBy: All businesses listed on buscobusiness.com go through a structured financial preparation process powered by iCFObusiness.
valuation.legalNote: The valuation service is provided by iCFObusiness, the financial structuring partner of buscobusiness.com.

value.title: Why prepare your business before selling
value.subtitle: A poorly prepared business creates distrust, prolongs negotiations and reduces the final price.

confidentiality.title: Total confidentiality
confidentiality.description: Your intention to sell remains discreet. We control who accesses information and when.

valuation.title: Realistic valuation
valuation.description: Rigorous financial analysis to determine a defensible market price and maximize value.

preparation.title: Document preparation
preparation.description: We organize financial, legal and operational information to accelerate due diligence.

process.title: How it works
process.subtitle: A structured process that protects your interests at every stage.

step1.title: Initial analysis
step1.description: We evaluate your business, financial situation and sale objectives.

step2.title: Preparation
step2.description: We structure information and prepare documentation for buyers.

step3.title: Qualified search
step3.description: We identify serious buyers who fit your business.

step4.title: Successful closing
step4.description: Support until signing, protecting your interests.

form.title: Start the conversation
form.description: Tell us about your business. A confidential, no-obligation call to understand your situation and explain how we can help.

cta.title: Your business deserves a sale to match
cta.subtitle: Start with a confidential conversation. No obligation.

hero.title: We turn complexity into clarity
hero.subtitle: We bridge the gap between businesses seeking new owners and decision-makers seeking real opportunities. With financial rigor, structured preparation and expert guidance.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: To transform how businesses are bought and sold in the SME market. We believe every business deserves a transaction to match: prepared, structured and executed with professional criteria.
mission.quote: A business is not sold well because it is published. It is sold well when it is prepared.

values.title: Our values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every decision and every transaction.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Discretion and confidentiality are the foundation of our work. We protect the interests of all parties involved.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.description: Structured information, rigorous analysis and transparent communication. No surprises or ambiguities.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: iCFO-level standards in every analysis. Professional preparation in every transaction.

team.title: Experience that makes the difference
team.subtitle: A multidisciplinary team with experience in M&A, corporate finance and business advisory.

financial.title: Financial Analysis
financial.description: Professionals with experience in business valuation, due diligence and deal structuring.

legal.title: Legal Advisory
legal.description: Network of collaborators specialized in commercial, tax and contract law for business transactions.

advisory.title: Strategic Guidance
advisory.description: Expert orientation from preparation to closing, protecting our clients' interests.

whyUs.title: Why Buscobusiness
whyUs.reason1: Because a poorly prepared business creates distrust and destroys value.
whyUs.reason2: Because buying without structure increases risk and reduces opportunities.
whyUs.reason3: Because every transaction deserves the same rigor as major M&A operations.
whyUs.closing: We turn companies into investable opportunities.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help you every step of the way.

verification.title: Identity verification
verification.description: To access complete business information, we need to verify your identity. Your data will be treated confidentially.
verification.confidentialityTerms: I accept the confidentiality agreement: I commit to not disclosing the information provided about the business to third parties without prior authorization.
verification.commissionTerms: I accept the commission terms: I understand and accept the applicable commission structure in the event the transaction is formalized.
verification.disclaimer: Your information will only be used to verify your identity and manage access to business data. See our Privacy Policy.
verification.legalNotice: By unlocking this business identity, you enter into a legally binding confidentiality and traceability agreement under the jurisdiction of the Principality of Andorra.
verification.successMessage: Access granted. You can now view all business information.
